title: Restore green Code Quality Gates on main after PR #198 merge
goal: Fix the three failures that turned Code Quality Gates red on the main push for PR #198: (1) check-coverage.mjs missing from the scripts/harness README inventory (Harness Inventory strict gate), (2) check-doc-frontmatter.mjs mirror drift against pantheon-harness (Harness Sync strict gate; canonical side is pantheon-base per PR #196 SonarCloud S2871 fix, upstream synced separately), (3) quality.yml go-lint enforcing full-repo lint on push events, contradicting the accepted-historical-debt policy already applied to ci.yml in PR #198.

in: scripts/harness/README.md: register check-coverage.mjs in the Pantheon Base Additions inventory
.github/workflows/quality.yml: go-lint enforce step becomes report-only for push events (PR/merge_group new-code enforcement unchanged)
out: any change to golangci-lint rules or lint debt itself (tracked in 2026-07-22-sonarcloud-remediation)
pantheon-harness upstream sync (committed directly to pantheon-harness main as 57223d9, one-line localeCompare sync)

taskDoc: Post-merge red-gate remediation for main push d58c84e8 (PR #198). Run 29969367373: Docs Governance failed on Harness Inventory + Harness Sync (strict on push), Go Lint failed on full-repo historical debt. CI and Security Gates on the same commit are green (2 CodeQL go/log-injection alerts on logger.go dismissed as false positive — SanitizeLogValue strings.Map barrier not modeled by CodeQL).
